title: Part 8 – Passages multiples : facture et rappel de paiement
instructions: Lisez les deux documents, puis répondez aux questions en faisant le lien entre eux.

passages.label: Facture
passages.text:
INVOICE
From: Apex Office Supplies
To: Bright Solutions Inc.
Invoice Number: AOS-3342
Date: March 1st
Payment Due: March 31st

Items:
- 10 boxes of printer paper: $120.00
- 5 office chairs: $750.00
- 20 ink cartridges: $300.00

Subtotal: $1,170.00
Delivery fee: $30.00
Total Due: $1,200.00

Payment Terms: Net 30 days. A late fee of 2% will be applied for payments received after the due date.

passages.label: E-mail de rappel
passages.text:
From: Apex Office Supplies - Accounts
To: Bright Solutions Inc. - Accounts Payable
Subject: Reminder: Invoice AOS-3342 Due Soon

Dear Accounts Team,

This is a friendly reminder that invoice AOS-3342, for a total of $1,200.00, is due on March 31st. As of today, we have not yet received payment.

If payment has already been sent, please disregard this message and let us know the payment reference number so we can update our records.

If you have any questions about the invoice, including the itemized charges, please contact us before the due date to avoid a late fee.

questions.prompt: What is the total amount due on invoice AOS-3342?
questions.explanation: "Total Due: $1,200.00", confirmé dans l'e-mail de rappel.

questions.prompt: How many office chairs were ordered?
What happens if payment is received after March 31st?
choices: A 2% late fee will be applied
The company will receive a discount
questions.explanation: "A late fee of 2% will be applied for payments received after the due date".

questions.prompt: What does the reminder email ask Bright Solutions to do if they already paid?
questions.explanation: "please disregard this message and let us know the payment reference number".

questions.prompt: What is the payment term mentioned on the invoice?
